name: @nexus-it/mobile
description: NEXUS IT Mobile App - Gestión desde celular

scripts.build:android: npm run prepare:expo && eas build --platform android
scripts.build:android:apk: npm run prepare:expo && eas build --platform android --profile production-apk
scripts.build:ios: npm run prepare:expo && eas build --platform ios
scripts.build:ios:internal: npm run prepare:expo && eas build --platform ios --profile production-ios-internal
scripts.update:production: npm run prepare:expo && eas update --channel production
scripts.update:preview: npm run prepare:expo && eas update --channel preview
